violations.description: Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Hot Hold burritos/sandwiches are time stamped to ensure disposal every 4 hours or less.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Open sour cream in refrigerator is not dated for open date.

Contaminated food disposition. — --Potentially hazardous food held for greater than four hours between 41F and 140F was not discarded when conditions require. Butter is out from this morning and planned ot be used by lunch. New butt out to begin softening. *Ensure whipped butter is time stamped for disposal.

Water Supply. — --Nonpublic water supply was not tested by EPA-certified laboratory monthly for bacteriological analysis. *Bacterial water samples for 03/31/26. 01/14/26, 10/01/2025. *Not being done monthly.
Toilet facilities. — --Toilet room was not provided with a tight fitting or self closing door. -Men's restroom door does not self-close.

Handling and storage of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not stored in a manner to protect against contamination of food, equipment, utensils, linens or single-service items. -Sanitizer solutions were made to incorrect concentrations, Sani bucket found at 200ppm (should be 100ppm); Sani sink bin found at 100ppm Chlorine (should be50ppm).

Date marking and disposition of ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food. — --Deli Express items are not date marked.--Refrigerated, ready-to-eat potentially hazardous food (prepared more than 24 hours ago) was not properly date marked. -Open package of ham in drawer is not date marked. -Open sour cream is not date marked.

Time as a public health control. — --Food was not served or discarded within four hours from the time when the food was removed from temperature control. - ~1 quart container of whipped butter left/used at cook line for up to 48 hours at a time (refrigerated during closed hours). *Ensure whipped butter is held at room temperature in small portions that are to be thrown away every 4 hours.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Dust/residue at top of table top ice machine. -Interior bottom of toaster oven had build up of spilled/dried food debris. -Residue at handle of back room freezer. -Frost build up at interior right side of walk in freezer.

Use of poisonous and toxic materials. — --Poisonous or toxic material was not used and/or applied according to manufacturer's label. -Sanitizer solutions were made to incorrect concentrations, Sani bucket found at 200ppm (should be 100ppm); Sani sink bin found at 100ppm Chlorine (should be 50ppm).
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Hot holding and cold holding temperatures maintained, unwrapped food not reserved (5 pts deducted)
Handwashing, good hygienic practices (5 pts deducted)
Clean, proper use, storage, sanitizing solution (2 pts deducted)
